title: Graduate Research Assistant
bullets: Generated a novel multi-modal sensorimotor dataset of 750+ high-precision robotic manipulation episodes for training imitation learning policies.
Pre-processed large-scale sensorimotor datasets including alignment, filtering, and format conversion across heterogeneous sensor modalities.

Optimized data collection pipeline by tuning end-effector hardware parameters and refining Python acquisition scripts, reducing per-episode collection time by 33% and improving movement recording accuracy by 40%.
Benchmarked PyTorch-based deep imitation learning algorithms across tasks requiring multi-sensor integration and fine dexterous control.

title: M.Eng. Robotics
bullets: Coursework in Path Planning, Perception, Controls, Robot Learning etc.
